# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-06-14 14:39 SGT. Total: 200. API-confirmed: 99.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 177ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
2. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 386ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
3. BUZZ — https://buzzai.cc — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 1315ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, anthropic, openai, grok
4. Avian — https://avian.io — score 9.8, API verified, region global, engine unknown, latency 84ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, anthropic, openai, deepseek, llama
5. Featherless — https://featherless.ai — score 9.8, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 109ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: gpt, openai, deepseek, qwen, mistral, llama
6. Yuegle API — https://api.yuegle.com — score 9.8, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 189ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
